issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.
The setup script includes macOS-specific brew commands, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: setup-detox-both-platforms
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response A omits global CLI, applesimutils, detox init, and uses a different config file.

scenarios.name: write-login-flow-test
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric, providing the required test suite structure, valid credentials test, and error test with element(by.id(...)) and expect(...).toBeVisible().
